ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracts" (
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tract */,
  "tract_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the tract */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the tract belongs to */,
  "geocoordinates" TEXT /* Geo-coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the tract */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the tract */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the tract in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the tract */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value of the tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract the data belongs to */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the tract */,
  "white_alone" INTEGER /* Number of white individuals */,
  "black_alone" INTEGER /* Number of black or African American individuals */,
  "indian_alone" INTEGER /* Number of American Indian and Alaska Native individuals */,
  "asian_alone" INTEGER /* Number of Asian individuals */,
  "pacific_islander_alone" INTEGER /* Number of Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander individuals */,
  "other_race_alone" INTEGER /* Number of individuals of some other race */,
  "two_or_more_races" INTEGER /* Number of individuals of two or more races */,
  "three_or_more_races" INTEGER /* Number of individuals of three or more races */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the demographic data was collected */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the tract */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population change entry */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract the change belongs to */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the population change */,
  "population_change" INTEGER /* Change in population */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the population change */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population change data */,
  "estimated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the population change is estimated */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the population change data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_changes_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_breakdowns" (
  "breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial breakdown entry */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract the breakdown belongs to */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race being represented */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population belonging to the race */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the racial breakdown data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the racial breakdown data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breakdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racial_breakdowns_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract the report is about */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the report is generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., population, racial breakdown) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy maker, public) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tract being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tract */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tract data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the data */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_permissions FOREIGN KEY ("permissions") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data update */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who versioned the data */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("versioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tract the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tract the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF, Markdown) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report template was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)
